docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF STATEMENT OF DAMAGES (TRANSACTION ID # 60293633) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEMESA, CYNTHIA

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-27-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE MAY-17-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEMESA, CYNTHIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NOGUERA, ERWIN $17,972.70 PRINCIPAL, $1,198.18 INTEREST, $1,011.75 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $20,182.63, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 60625859)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-27-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
